title: Recycled - Repurposed tyres a how to from Cambodia
description: I came across this unique way of recycling old tyres when i was in Cambodia. My wife and I keep a blog of our travels at www.agapinthehimalayas.blogspot.com - if you fancy a read - we also have some other vidoes of our trips on www.youtube/user/backpackingdiary - The tyres are one step beyond planters and i love it. They are all over the place here - someone is making these with a will. I have never seen them anywhere else - i wonder why not - it is truly fantastic - they should export them.
